# Eitan Gorodetsky

> AI-native marketing operator. Builds and runs a multi-pillar marketing operation — agency work, owned ventures, and products — largely solo, on the AI layer, and writes about what it actually takes. 15+ years across iGaming, tech, and digital (€100M+ budgets, 20+ regulated markets, teams to 120).

## Core pages
- [Home](https://eitangorodetsky.com/): What an AI-native marketing operation is, and how Eitan runs one.
- [About](https://eitangorodetsky.com/about): Background — Israel → Malta → Australia; 15 years across iGaming, tech, and digital; now building in the open.
- [Services / Work With Me](https://eitangorodetsky.com/work-with-me): Margin Recovery Audit, fractional operational engagements, speaking.
- [Career](https://eitangorodetsky.com/career): Full professional history (888 Holdings, Catena Media, Betsson Group, Speed Media Group, TonyBet).
- [Contact](https://eitangorodetsky.com/contact): Get in touch.

## Writing (essays)
- [Writing index](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing): Essays on building and operating an AI-native marketing business.
- [What an AI-native marketing operation actually looks like](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing/ai-native-marketing-operation): The difference between *using* AI and *running on* it; the four architectural layers (memory, integration, codified workflows, gated autonomy) and the AI-native maturity ladder.
- [Where Gen-AI actually moves marketing ROI — and where it's theatre](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing/where-ai-moves-roi): The compounding test for separating AI leverage from AI theatre.
- [AI governance that speeds you up — govern the blast radius, not the intelligence](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing/ai-governance-blast-radius): Governance as an accelerator; control what AI can touch, not what it can think.

## Frameworks
- [The AI-native maturity ladder](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing/ai-native-marketing-operation): Tools → Assistants → Colleagues → Operating system.
- [The compounding test](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing/where-ai-moves-roi): Does it touch the real system, remember across time, and run repeatedly + improve?
- [Govern the blast radius, not the intelligence](https://eitangorodetsky.com/writing/ai-governance-blast-radius): Least-privilege hands, gated promotion, provenance, data boundaries, named accountability.

## Thinking
- [Thinking](https://eitangorodetsky.com/thinking): Frameworks and methodology.
- [Operations Intelligence Architecture](https://eitangorodetsky.com/thinking/oia)
- [SCU](https://eitangorodetsky.com/thinking/scu)
- [Building with AI](https://eitangorodetsky.com/thinking/ai): An operator's view of building with AI.

## Inner World
- [Inner World](https://eitangorodetsky.com/inner-world): The practices behind the operator — freediving, Kabbalah, bodywork, sound.

## Topics of authority
- AI-native marketing operations
- The AI-native maturity ladder (Tools → Assistants → Colleagues → Operating system)
- AI governance and the blast-radius model
- Where Gen-AI moves marketing ROI versus theatre (the compounding test)
- Operational intelligence and margin recovery
- iGaming and performance marketing at scale
